steps.t: Something was placed at the western gate of Trestlebridge. You should examine the situation there.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
Aran Greenwith can be found near Cotfast in the Wildwood. You should talk to Aran Greenwith near Cotfast.
Cotfast can be found in the Wildwood. You should enter Cotfast.
Orc bounties and bribing gold can be found in Cotfast. You should destroy the Orc bounties, collect the bribing gold, and defeat foes at Cotfast.
The building in which Gothtal is holed up can be found in Cotfast. You should knock on the door and confront Gothtal.
The Cotfast village alarm can be found nearby. You should sound the alarm to get Gothtal's attention.
Aran Greenwith can be found near Cotfast in the Wildwood. You should talk to Aran Greenwith near Cotfast.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
Reconstruction work continues on Trestlebridge. You should survey the reconstruction of Trestlebridge.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
